еє≤жФѓгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ15зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дЄБдЄС]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[еЈ±еНѓ]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[жИК]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[еЬЯ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[еѓЕ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[жЬ®]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|зЫЄеЙЛ]]пЉИжЬ®еЙЛеЬЯпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ

==жИКеѓЕгБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ0гГї5пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[еЇЪ]]гГї[[дєЩ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[1жЬИ]]гБМжИКеѓЕгБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[зЂЛжШ•]]гБЛгВЙ[[еХУиЯД]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==жИКеѓЕгБЃжЧ•== жИКеѓЕгБЃжЧ•гБЃ[[йБЄжЧ•]]гБѓдї•дЄЛгБЃйАЪгВКгАВ ===йБЄжЧ•=== жИКеѓЕгБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[зКѓеЬЯ|е∞ПеЬЯ]]гБЃ1жЧ•зЫЃгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:жИКеѓЕ]]

{{еє≤жФѓ}} '''жИКеѓЕ'''пЉИгБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБ®гВЙгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБ®гВЙгАБгБЉгБДгВУпЉЙгБѓгАБ[[еє≤жФѓ]]гБЃдЄАгБ§гАВ
еє≤жФѓгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ15зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дЄБдЄС]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[еЈ±еНѓ]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[жИК]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[еЬЯ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[еѓЕ]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[жЬ®]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄеЙЛпЉИгБЭгБЖгБУгБПпЉЙ|зЫЄеЙЛ]]пЉИжЬ®еЙЛеЬЯпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Tiger (жИКеѓЕ) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єy√≠n ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muin (лђімЭЄ) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u DбЇІn

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] is designated as the Bointora [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Tiger== The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows. === Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) === Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}. ==See Also== *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Tiger also known as жИКеѓЕ''' (tsuchinoetora, bodonotora, boin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (еЬЯ)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} is designated as the Bointora {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Tiger==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) ===
Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Tiger also known as жИКеѓЕ''' (tsuchinoetora, bodonotora, boin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 15th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teiushi|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|дЄБдЄС|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kib≈Н|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|еЈ±еНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kib≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly ==Months of Yang Earth Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|K≈Н|ja|еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|lt=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|2=ja|3=еЇЪ|4=zh|5=еЇЪ|1=Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/K≈Н|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (еЇЪ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Etsu|ja|дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|lt=Kinoto (дєЩ)|2=ja|3=дєЩ|4=zh|5=дєЩ|1=Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Etsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (дєЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} is designated as the Bointora {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Awakening of Insects}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Tiger==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|йБЄжЧ•|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bointora is as follows.
=== Selected Day (йБЄжЧ•) ===
Bointora day is the 1st day of {{ill|Hando|ja|зКѓеЬЯ|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=е∞ПеЬЯ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
